mapper.select: SELECT api_key_id AS apiKeyId, tenant_id AS tenantId, COUNT(*) AS totalCalls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 399) AS successCalls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_code >= 400) AS errorCalls, COALESCE(AVG(latency_ms)::INT, 0) AS avgLatencyMs, COALESCE(MAX(latency_ms), 0) AS maxLatencyMs, COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)::INT, 0) AS p99LatencyMs FROM api_access_logs WHERE created_at >= #{statDate}::DATE AND created_at < #{statDate}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY api_key_id, tenant_id
